CD138 really good marker for epithelia

14_JK14-5568_2a_3

![](media/image39.png){width="6.267716535433071in"
height="8.083333333333334in"}

-really dense area (green CD3D and dna in blue)

![](media/image3.png){width="6.267716535433071in"
height="3.8472222222222223in"}

-PD-1 and PD-L1 not so good

-p16 good, CD3D, CD8, Iba1, cd4, cd11, Vimetin, CD163, PanCK,NKG2, Ki67,
FOX-P3, HLA-A, pSTAT, HLA-DPB1, CD20

-CD138 (for future analysis also stratified epithelia expresses)

-p63 not so good (image below
